input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that deliberately exercise OGNL internals against JDK classes or private reflective access may need JVM module opens such as java.base/java.lang or java.base/java.util, but that is test-specific coverage design rather than prerequisite library setup.
OGNL has optional system properties such as ognl.security.manager and ognl.UseJDK9PlusAccessHandler; they should only be set by tests that intentionally cover those optional modes.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process Java expression/property access library. The resolved ognl:ognl:3.3.5 artifact brings its only runtime dependency, org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA, transitively; normal usage does not require a service, Docker image, extra test dependency, environment variable, or mandatory system property.
